title: pyrus detergibilis
intro: Pyrus detergibilis is a type of plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is commonly known as the Detergent Pear. It is a plant-based substance traditionally used to create a natural soap or detergent, due to its saponin content. The medicinal properties of Pyrus detergibilis include its ability to clean wounds and reduce inflammation, while its health benefits include soothing skin irritations and promoting skin health. Pyrus detergibilis can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, or even used as a raw ingredient in soap-making, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine and natural skincare.
